response.justification: Bogdan is technically well beyond what this role requires — 15+ years across full-stack, TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, and AI/agent infrastructure — making him significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level position. His technical fit is near-perfect on paper, but the seniority gap introduces real retention risk; he is unlikely to find the scope of a junior/mid IC role engaging long-term. The location (Lagos, Nigeria) is also a hard blocker given the role's high on-site presence requirement in what appears to be a Berlin-based company, unless relocation is confirmed. If those two issues are resolved, the technical match warrants a conversation.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise directly matching the core stack, with recent fullstack work at re:cinq and Optilyz using React and AWS CDK
Hands-on LLM and AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) — directly addresses the nice-to-have bonus criteria
Proven software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, clean architecture) aligning with the role's stated interest in clean software architecture
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff/Senior-level with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level role creates high risk of disengagement, rapid attrition, or salary misalignment
Location mismatch: currently based in Lagos, Nigeria, while the role demands high on-site presence — no indication of relocation intent
Relational database experience is thin relative to requirements: primary DB exposure is MongoDB and DLang-specific stores; PostgreSQL, the preferred technology, does not appear in the resume
